title: Tomato
description: Adds tomatoes and other stuff to minecraft
body:
Tomato123 adds several tomato-themed items and features to enhance farming and survival gameplay, including a new cooking system for pasta and tomato dishes.

🌟 Features:
Tomato – A new food item you can eat to restore hunger.

Infimato – An infinite tomato that never gets consumed when eaten.

Tomato Plant – A new crop that grows tomatoes over time.

Tomato Juice – An item that can be used in crafting dishes.

Tomato Juice with Pasta – A dish that restores more hunger than individual items.

Dough – An item used to cook pasta in a furnace.

Pasta – A food item that can be used to create hearty dishes.

🧑‍🌾 How It Affects Gameplay:
Adds more variety to farming and food in survival mode.

Introduces a new cooking system, where players can make pasta and other dishes.

The Infimato is a unique, never-ending food item, ideal for survival play.

Tomato Juice is a versatile item for crafting, while Tomato Juice with Pasta restores more hunger.

Dough and Pasta introduce a new cooking mechanic, making food production even more enjoyable.


CurseForge:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tomato123](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tomato123)
